message.content:
@startuml
title Package Installation Sequence Diagram

participant "InstallInstalling" as InstallInstalling #LightBlue
participant "PackageInstaller" as PackageInstaller #LightGreen
participant "PackageInstallerService" as PackageInstallerService #YellowOrange
participant "InstallingAsyncTask" as InstallingAsyncTask #Pink
participant "PackageInstallerSession" as PackageInstallerSession #Lavender
participant Handler #Cyan
participant mhandlerCallback #Magenta
participant PkMS #Gold
participant PKMS.PackageHandler #Salmon
participant PKMS.HandlerParams #Turquoise
participant PKMS.InstallParams #Plum


== Initialization ==
activate InstallInstalling 
    note over InstallInstalling : onCreate()
deactivate InstallInstalling 

create Session of PackageInstallerSession
note right of Create Session: createSession()
Create Session ->> PackageInstallerService:createSession()
return sessionId from PackageInstallerService to InstallInstalling 


== Execution Flow ==
group onResume Phase {
  activate InstallInstalling  
      note left of Resume Note:onResume()
   deactivate InstallInstalling
   
}



execute()->>+InstallingAsyncTask: execute();
doInBackground->>-InstallingAsyncTask;




openWrite(SESSION_ID)->+PackageInstallerSession ;
commitNonStagedLocked(PackageInfo);
installStage0(INIT_COPY)-->Pkms.sendMessage(init_copy): startCopy(handleStartCopy()) --> handleReturnCode(code=success/failure).processPendingInstalls(). processInstallRequestsAsynclnstaIlPackagesTracedLI(instalIPackagesLipreparePackagelI(scan Packa ge Trac ed LI commit Packages Locked () .com mit Reconciled Scan Result Locke d (). com mi t Pac kage Settings ()) return success or failure status back through callback chain up until user gets notified about completion state via UI update mechanism provided by system framework components like Activity Manager Service etc.. All these steps ensure proper handling during installation phase including error checking mechanisms built into each layer ensuring robustness against potential failures occurring anywhere along execution path leading towards final outcome being either successful deployment OR appropriate reporting if something went wrong somewhere down line preventing normal operation flow expected under
